Subject: Re: Diwali Episode Guest Spot
Body_Summary: Hi Hari, I would love to come on for the Diwali episode. October 17 works perfectly for me. I can talk about the township's festival plans and the new Oak Tree Road beautification grant. Let me know the time slot and I will block it. - Neela

Subject: Re: Desi Vibes - Diwali Special
Body_Summary: Hari bhai, count me in for the Diwali episode. Happy to do a segment on festive cooking - maybe a live recipe walkthrough? Just tell me when and how long. - Chef Arjun

Subject: Ad Spot Inquiry - Diwali Week
Body_Summary: Mr. Jefferson, we are interested in an ad spot during your Diwali programming. Could you send over rates and available slots? We would want 2-3 spots during the week of Oct 13-17. Thanks, Meera Patel, Patel's Jewelers

Subject: Sponsorship Renewal - WDVI
Body_Summary: Hari, Edison Savings Bank would like to renew our sponsorship for Q4. Same terms as last quarter: $200/month for the 60-second spot. Please confirm. - Tom Henderson, Community Relations
